verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The moment now has come There's nothing to be done My accusers stand before me And there's nowhere left to run.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So it ends this way There's nothing more to say I will pay the price and give my life For the choice that I have made. Oh, but suddenly, what is this I see As I'm cast into the fire There is One who stands by me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I saw the Fourth Man Between the flames at night When there was no hope at all He saved me just in time Holding back the forces That press on every side I am saved by the Fourth Man in the fire I am saved by the Fourth Man in the fire

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now the test is past But it was not the last For my accusers seek To find me weak And constantly attack. Searching to and fro Constantly they go And in my desperate hour Seek to devour And strike the fatal blow

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But I am not afraid Oh, and they are much dismayed For between us stands The Son of man And the standard He has raised

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus Christ's for me In my hour of need (In my desperate hour) Standing at my side He's holding back the tide When there was no hope at all He saved me just in time

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I saw the Fourth Man Between the flames at night When there was no hope at all He saved me just in time Nothing now can harm me with Jesus at my side I am saved by the Fourth Man in the fire I am saved by the Fourth Man in the fire
